cleavage agent: the top hits for proteomics included known contaminants in proteomic studies including trypsin
collision energy: stepped HCD collision energy of 28,30 and 32%
fractionation method: Following separation via composite SDS-Urea-Agarose-Polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis
instrument: coupled on-line with an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: Nano-electrospray ion source with spray voltage 2.55 kV
